converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Clesson Nathan Turner papers
Turner, Clesson Nathan, 1908-
21-11-810
14 cubic feet. 14 cubic feet.
[ca. 1926]-1987 -1944-1963 (bulk) Notes, correspondence, reports, bulletins, articles and photographs. Materials relating to Turner's career as professor and agricultural engineer. Collection material in English 2084393
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Julia ParkerNancy Dean
Date completed:
February 2002
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, July 2003
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of Agricultural Engineering.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes reports and minutes of the New York Farm Electrification Council and notes, data and correspondence pertaining to bulk milk cooling and other projects; correspondence concerning the work of the Council, agricultural engineering, and the installation and operation of electrically powered farm equipment, as well as correspondence and material concerning the American Society of Agricultural Engineers; reports, bulletins, articles, and addresses by Turner and others concerning the use of electricity on the farm, with related photographs. Also, notes on tile drainage and material for his course Agricultural Engineering 101.
Also, paper on "The Poole Electric Clock," by Professor Turner, 1987, published in the Bulletin of the National Association of Watch and Clock Collectors, Inc., August 1988.
Cite As:
Clesson Nathan Turner papers, #21-11-810. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Agricultural engineers. Rural electrification Milk -- Cooling -- Equipment and supplies. Milk tanks. Farm equipment. Electricity in agriculture. Drainage. Drain-tiles. Dairy engineering. Agricultural engineering. New York Farm Electrification Council American Society of Agricultural Engineers New York State College of Agriculture. Department of Agricultural Engineering
